# Diffusion Cascade Shape

Organic and manufactured diffusion can leave different cascade shapes.

## Organic-looking cascade

Often has:

- one or several early seeds
- gradual adoption
- branching through diverse communities
- heterogeneous captions and comments
- secondary waves from real audience discovery

## Manufactured-looking cascade

May show:

- many seeds at once
- synchronized first wave
- repeated assets
- high early velocity
- weak downstream diversity
- low conversion after high visibility
- limited organic branching

## Cascade metrics

| Metric | Meaning |
|---|---|
| Time to peak | how quickly activity reaches maximum |
| Branching factor | how many new actors each actor appears to trigger |
| Depth | how many steps the cascade travels |
| Breadth | how many actors participate at each stage |
| Reproduction ratio | estimated actions triggered per prior action |
| Decay rate | how quickly activity falls after peak |

## Hawkes-process intuition

A self-exciting process models events that increase the probability of future events. Organic virality can appear self-exciting. Manufactured launches can appear as exogenous shocks: a large first wave not explained by earlier audience response.

## Caution

Cascade inference is hard. Use it to compare patterns, not to declare guilt.
